name: vscode-backviews
description: First-person backrooms explorer rendered inside a VSCode webview, driven by the cmd-backedges infinite maze generation API. While Copilot works, its chat responses and job status are ghost-written on the walls with a camcorder token counter on the HUD.
author: John Haugabook

languageModelTools.name: backviews_reportJob
languageModelTools.userDescription: Writes the agent's current job status on the backrooms walls and drives the HUD token counter.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Report your current job status to the BackViews game running in this workspace. Call this when you start working on a chat request, again whenever the work moves to a new step, and once more with done=true when the job is finished. The status text is scrawled on the backrooms walls and the token count drives a camcorder-style counter on the game's HUD.

status.description: Short status text to scrawl on the walls (e.g. 'reading the codebase', 'rewriting the parser')

tokens.description: Approximate tokens consumed by the current job so far

done.description: Set true when the job is finished; the walls stop updating and the counter fades out

backviews.seed.description: Maze seed. The same seed always produces the same backrooms. 0 picks a random seed each time the panel opens.

backviews.moveSpeed.description: Walking speed in cells per second.

backviews.renderDistance.description: How many cells around the player are meshed and drawn.

backviews.cameraShake.description: Handheld camera sway and walking head-bob.

backviews.filmGrain.description: Grainy 1990 camcorder footage overlay (grain, vignette, tracking noise).

backviews.vhsHud.description: Camcorder HUD: blinking REC dot, timestamp, and tape mode indicator.

backviews.furniture.description: Render the random furniture and columns the generator places in open cells.

backviews.wallpaperShifts.description: Wallpaper changes tint and pattern inside randomly shaped enclosed zones.

backviews.mouseLook.description: Click the view to capture the mouse and look around. Q/E always rotate.

backviews.invertTurn.description: Flip turn direction for the mouse and turn keys.

enumDescriptions: Yellow wallpaper mix driven by the generator's per-edge surface types
Ceramic tile walls with a cool cast

backviews.materialHueShift.description: Rotate the wall material hue, in degrees.

backviews.monsterSpeed.description: Monster speed in cells per second.

backviews.monsterSpawnMin.description: Earliest monster spawn, in minutes after the world starts.

backviews.monsterSpawnMax.description: Latest monster spawn, in minutes after the world starts.

backviews.copilotGhostWriter.description: Copilot ghost-writer: while Copilot works, scrawl its chat responses and job status live on nearby walls in a messy ink script, and run a camcorder-style token counter under the HUD battery icon. One toggle for the whole feature.
